item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rhetan TMT Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 27.95
item.description: Surging to a new 52-week high of Rs 27.95 on 22 Apr 2026, Rhetan TMT Ltd has demonstrated robust price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market despite a subdued Sensex. The stock’s technical indicators reveal a compelling alignment that has propelled this rally, underscoring the strength behind this milestone. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Nivaka Fashions Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 1.24 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fourth consecutive session, Nivaka Fashions Ltd has seen its share price decline, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 1.24 on 22 Apr 2026. This marks a steep 76.9% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 5.37, underscoring persistent selling pressure amid challenging fundamentals. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Mahindra Logistics Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 436.45
item.description: Mahindra Logistics Ltd has reached a new 52-week high on 22 Apr 2026, with its stock price touching an intraday peak of ₹436.45, reflecting strong momentum in the transport services sector despite broader market pressures. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Fundviser Capital to 52-Week High of Rs 447.15
item.description: With a remarkable surge to Rs 447.15 on 22 Apr 2026, Fundviser Capital (India) Ltd has reached a new 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum that outpaces the broader market. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Dynamatic Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 11755.05
item.description: Surging to an all-time high of Rs 11,755.05 on 22 Apr 2026, Dynamatic Technologies Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outpacing its sector and the broader market despite a subdued Sensex. This milestone caps a 78.31% gain over the past year, underscoring the stock’s robust technical foundation and sustained upward trajectory. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Sumuka Agro Industries Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Sumuka Agro Industries Ltd’s stock price has declined to a fresh 52-week low of ₹151.20 on 22 April 2026, marking a significant downturn for the micro-cap FMCG company. The stock’s recent performance reflects a combination of valuation concerns, promoter stake reduction, and broader market dynamics. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Inox India Ltd Surges 7.48% to Day's High of Rs 1602.5 — Outperforms Sector by 7.92 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.95% on 22 Apr 2026, Inox India Ltd surged 7.48%, touching a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1602.5. This 7.92-percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: RattanIndia Power Ltd Surges 7.15% to Day's High — Outperforms Power Sector by 3.55 Percentage Points
item.description: In a session marked by broad market weakness, RattanIndia Power Ltd surged 7.15% on 22 Apr 2026, significantly outpacing the Power sector's 2.82% gain and the Sensex's 0.98% decline. This 3.55-percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific strength that demands closer scrutiny. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 22 Apr 2026
item.description: Shares of Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd experienced notable intraday weakness on 22 Apr 2026, touching a low of Rs 3,147, down 3.08% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market amid sustained selling pressure, reflecting a cautious market sentiment towards the automobile giant. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Elecon Engineering Company Ltd Surges 7.5% to Day's High of Rs 506.5 — Outperforms Sector by 6.07 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.98% on 22 Apr 2026, Elecon Engineering Company Ltd surged 7.5%, touching an intraday high of Rs 506.5. This 6.07 percentage-point outperformance over its Industrial Manufacturing sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust Opens 5.93% Higher Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust commenced trading on 22 April 2026 with a significant gap up, registering a 5.93% increase at the opening bell. This strong start contrasted with the broader market’s modest decline, reflecting a notable shift in market sentiment towards the stock on the day. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Half-Year Rally with 180.9% Return Outperforming Benchmarks
item.description: Covance Softsol has emerged as the standout performer among micro cap stocks over the past six months, delivering an exceptional return of 180.87%, significantly outpacing benchmark indices and peers across sectors. This remarkable rally is underpinned by a combination of robust financials, attractive valuation, and positive technical indicators, positioning the stock as a compelling buy in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Exceptional Stock Returns with 2831% Gain in One Year
item.description: Covance Softsol has delivered an extraordinary return of 2831.3% over the past year, outpacing all other top performers across sectors and market capitalisations. This micro-cap software and consulting firm’s remarkable surge has been driven by a combination of strong financials, attractive valuation, and positive technical signals, setting it apart in a challenging market environment. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Rhetan TMT Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: After surging 9.56% on 22 Apr 2026, Rhetan TMT Ltd touched a fresh all-time high of ₹27.95, significantly outpacing the Sensex which declined 1.03% on the same day. This milestone caps a strong run for the small-cap iron and steel products company, which has now gained 14.93% year-to-date and an impressive 44.30% over the past year, far exceeding broader market returns. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Atlanta Electricals Ltd Surges 7.37% to Day's High of Rs 1463.15 — Outperforms Sector by 4.23 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.94% on 22 Apr 2026, yet Atlanta Electricals Ltd surged 7.37%, reaching a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1463.15. This 4.23 percentage-point outperformance over the Electric Equipment sector’s 2.41% gain highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally in a broadly weak market environment. Time: 28 minutes ago

item.title: Sansera Engineering Ltd Surges 7.22% to Day's High of Rs 2565.35 — Outperforms Sector by 7.28 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.94% on 22 Apr 2026, Sansera Engineering Ltd surged 7.22%, touching an intraday high of Rs 2565.35. This 7.28 percentage-point outperformance over its Auto Components & Equipments sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally in an otherwise weak market environment. Time: 28 minutes ago

item.title: Lux Industries Ltd Surges 7.56% to Day's High of Rs 1579.35 — Outperforms Sector by 7.45 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.94% on 22 Apr 2026, while Lux Industries Ltd surged 7.56%, marking a remarkable outperformance of 7.45 percentage points over its Garments & Apparels sector peers. This strong intraday gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, which touched an intraday high of Rs 1579.35, an 8.09% rise from its previous close. Time: 28 minutes ago

item.title: Suncare Traders Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 0.5 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline of 45.36% over the past year has culminated in Suncare Traders Ltd hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 0.5 on 22 Apr 2026, underscoring persistent weakness despite a broader market that has shown resilience in recent weeks. Time: 40 minutes ago

item.title: Data Patterns (India) Ltd Surges 7.82% to Day's High of Rs 3785 — Outperforms Sector by 10.95 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.89% on 22 Apr 2026, while Data Patterns (India) Ltd surged 7.82%, marking a striking 10.95-percentage-point outperformance over its Aerospace & Defense sector peers. This sharp single-session gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, which also touched a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 3785 during the day. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Tube Investments of India Ltd Rallies 5.24% and Surpasses All Major Moving Averages
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.89% on 22 Apr 2026, yet Tube Investments of India Ltd surged 5.24%, outperforming its sector by nearly 5 percentage points. This robust single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market, signalling a noteworthy shift in momentum for the mid-cap auto components player. Time: 43 minutes ago
